final:
module RefModule(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input clk,            // Added clk input
    output reg out_always
);reg unused_pipeline_reg;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    unused_pipeline_reg <= sel_b1;
end

always @(*) begin
    if (unused_pipeline_reg) begin
        out_always = b;
    end else begin
        out_always = a;
    end
end

endmodule
